allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-ChildItem logs\\run_*.log | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1 | Get-Content | Select-String -Pattern 'running|DONE|done|exit' | Select-Object -First 20")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-ChildItem logs\\run_*.log | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1 | Get-Content | Select-String -Pattern 'running|DONE|done|fatal' | Select-Object -First 30")

PowerShell(git commit -m "Fix streak settlement: BOTH-team clean-sheet and team-specific labels" -m "- 'Without clean sheet' with team='both' now settles HIT when both scored \(each conceded\). Previously always MISS." -m "- 'No goals scored' extended for 'both' \(HIT only at 0-0\)." -m "- 'First to score / first to concede / first half winner / loser' return 'na' instead of forced MISS when team='both'." -m "Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>")
